name: reset_msg_count
full_help:
reset_msg_count

Description: 
Reset message count

Syntax: 
reset_msg_count  [-quiet] [-verbose] <id>

Returns: 
new message count

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <id>        Unique message Id to be reset, e.g. "Common 17-99".
              "reset_msg_count -id *" reset all counters

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
